title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented the latest advancements in its NoSQL database offerings: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. The session covered new product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps designed to support AI applications and agentic workloads with high performance, flexibility, and scalability.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session walks through recent advancements across three NoSQL databases: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. It covers new product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps aimed at supporting AI applications and agentic workloads with high performance, flexibility, and scalability. The framing connects these databases to vector database use and multi-agent systems, signaling how Google positions its NoSQL portfolio for modern and AI-driven apps.
